workout.warmup: Incline walk · 8–10 min · 3.3–3.5 mph · 6–8% incline — do not skip.
workout.finisher: Incline walk · 10 min · 3.3–3.5 mph · 6–8% incline. Weekend session — OK to go a little longer if feeling good.

exercises.name: Chest Press Machine
exercises.note: First full session at 135. June 12 you hit 135 × 10 on set 3 — now hold it for all 3. Controlled tempo, no rushing.

exercises.name: Shoulder Press Machine (neutral grip)
exercises.note: This was your working weight on June 12 — felt difficult but right. Hold at 80. Push for 11–12 on set 3 if feeling strong.

exercises.name: Cable Row
exercises.note: Building back up after conservative June 12 session (120/120/135). Try 135 across all 3 sets now. If back feels strong and no flare, bump to 150 next session.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.note: First session at 125 was June 12 — got all reps clean. Hold to confirm, then bump to 130 next session.

exercises.name: Face Pulls
exercises.note: Hold at 50 lb. Elbows high and wide. Good for shoulder and upper back recovery.

exercises.name: Lateral Raise
exercises.note: Got 15/15/12 on June 12 — shoulders gas out late. Lead with elbow, stop at shoulder height. Hold at 15 lb.

exercises.name: Arms Superset: Rope Pushdown + EZ-Bar Curl
exercises.detail: Rope Pushdown 80 lb × 12 + EZ-Bar Curl 45 lb × 10 · 3 rounds
exercises.note: Rotating bicep from incline curl (June 12). Skull crusher stays off until back is fully clear — rope pushdown is the tricep movement for now.

exercises.name: Core Circuit C
exercises.detail: Cable Crunch 50 lb × 12 + Hanging Knee Raise × 10–12 + Side Plank 30s/side · 2 rounds
exercises.note: Neither movement loads the upper back — safe to do. Full round through the crunch, controlled on the knee raises.

workout.coach_notes: Back is tracking in the right direction — stayed pain-free through all of Friday's lower body. Keep listening to it. If cable row provokes anything, drop to 120 or skip. Skull crusher and T-bar row stay off until sharpness is completely gone.
